{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Foundation of Night
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'[[Foundation of Night]]' is a piece of literature written by an ancient [[Architect]] regarding the foundation of the [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“A quote from Foundation of Night,” Zhen explained to Shera. “Written by an ancient Architect regarding the foundation of our Guild.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Literature]]
